name: scenario-20-dep-confusion-target
comment: DELIBERATELY VULNERABLE FIXTURE — see scenarios/20-dependency-confusion/README.md.  DO NOT run `npm install` in this directory: the @acme-internal scope is intentionally not pinned to a private registry, and an attacker can claim those names on public npm.  The preinstall script below makes the install fail-closed so accidental invocation can't pull anything; it is safety scaffolding, NOT part of the lesson.

scripts.preinstall:
node -e "console.error('
*** SAFETY GUARD ***
This is a deliberately-vulnerable cicd-goat fixture (scenario 20).
Do not install dependencies — read scenarios/20-dependency-confusion/README.md instead.
'); process.exit(2)"
